aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Hill Heating and Cooling due to limited conversational content and weak authority signals, but improvements can change this.
quick_wins: Expand content to include more detailed service explanations and customer FAQs.
Implement structured data for FAQPage and HowTo to align with AI query patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with good reviews, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema enhancements (e.g., openingHours, paymentAccepted).
No FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or repair processes.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed pricing information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding service-related FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed case studies.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to chatbots and voice assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and chat queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your GBP is strong, but AI models prioritize sites with rich, structured content and authority signals.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates conversational content, structured data, and authority signals to make your business the top AI-recommended choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential customers—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Hill Heating and Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found exciting opportunities to make your HVAC services irresistible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your online presence for AI and capture more leads. Are you available for a quick call?
